howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.body: Before every preset application or manual edit, a snapshot of the ini files is created in the `.uesm-backups` folder next to the configs.

reset.noFiles: Override files are already absent — only GameUserSettings.ini remains. A backup was created just in case.
reset.success: Reset completed: removed {{files}}. GameUserSettings.ini kept. Backup {{backupId}}. Restart the game.
reset.sectionDesc: Removes Engine.ini, Game.ini, Scalability.ini and Input.ini. GameUserSettings.ini is left untouched.
reset.confirmBody: A backup is created before reset. The game must be closed. Continue?

empty.selectGameDesc: Open the library and select a game with config — the list of ini backups will appear here.

configMissing.title: Config not found — {{name}}
configMissing.body: Specify the Saved/Config/Windows folder in the library or launch the game once.

list.title: Backup list
list.emptyDesc: Apply a preset or save manual edits — the first copy will appear automatically.

banner.title: Backup created
banner.fallback: Backup {{backupId}}. Roll back in the "Backups" tab.
